response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role with 15+ years of experience and current Staff Engineer title. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS background aligns well with the stack, but seniority mismatch raises concerns about role fit, salary expectations, and retention. Only basic German noted despite high on-site presence in what appears to be a German market role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple senior roles
Strong fullstack breadth from database to UI, plus DevOps and AWS exposure
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, clean architecture
concerns: Severe seniority overqualification for an entry-level IC position
Only basic German for a role requiring high on-site presence likely in DACH region
